# Archon Consultancies

> Archon Consultancies is a Spanish AI consultancy and AI agency for companies that need automation, operational systems, workflows with AI, and digital brain infrastructure.

## Main pages

- [Home](https://archonconsultancies.com/): overview of Archon Consultancies, automation, AI workflows, operational systems, and CTA to book a free audit.
- [Consultoria de IA](https://archonconsultancies.com/consultoria-ia.html): service page for AI consulting for companies and SMEs in Spain.
- [Agencia de IA](https://archonconsultancies.com/agencia-ia.html): service page for done-for-you AI implementation, agents, and automations.
- [Automatizacion con IA](https://archonconsultancies.com/automatizacion-ia-empresas.html): support page focused on AI automation for companies and SMEs.

## Core topics

- AI consulting for companies
- AI agency for companies
- AI automation for companies
- Workflow automation
- AI agents
- Operational systems
- Digital brain infrastructure
- Process optimization
- AI implementation for SMEs

## Contact

- Audit request: mailto:auditoria@archonconsultancies.com
